news.t: DWS Expands Xtrackers ESG Suite With Dividend, Growth and Value ETFs

holdings.infoBox: SNPD is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are Verizon Communications stock at 3.24%, Robert Half at 3.12%, Edison International at 2.71%, Franklin Resources at 2.36%, and Best Buy Co. at 2.26%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers S&P Dividend Aristocrats Screened ETF (SNPD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks an index of US companies with consistent dividend increases that are screened for certain environmental, social, and governance criteria. The index is weighted based on annual dividend yield. SNPD was launched on Nov 9, 2022 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: S&P High Yield Dividend Aristocrats Screened Index

data.title: DWS Expands Xtrackers ESG Suite With Dividend, Growth and Value ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DWS, one of the world's leading asset managers, announced today the listing of three new exchange-traded funds (ETFs) that provide exposure to U.S. equity investment styles ...
